# Tabserve — Apps & Guides Hub

> Landing pages and SEO guides for Tabserve's mobile apps: OneBag (travel packing), Routevia (Türkiye trip planner), RentFlow (rental manager). Includes airline baggage guides, packing checklists, Türkiye destination pages and rental calculators.

## Apps
- [OneBag](https://coinsayfasi.github.io/onebag/): Smart carry-on packing lists + airline baggage rules.
- [Routevia](https://coinsayfasi.github.io/routevia-app/): Discover places across Türkiye + AI trip routes.
- [RentFlow](https://coinsayfasi.github.io/rentflow/): Rental manager + free yield/cash-flow calculators.

## More
- Türkiye travel guides: https://gezi.tabserve.com.tr/
- English travel & app guides: https://apps.tabserve.com.tr/
- Contact: teknopattv@gmail.com
